ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., wearable, IoT sensor) */,
  "sensor_config" TEXT /* Configuration of sensors on the device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "device_firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "device_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "device_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "device_last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "device_next_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., accelerometer, gyroscope, magnetometer) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for sensor readings (e.g., g, rad/s, degree) */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "sensor_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "sensor_firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the sensor */,
  "sensor_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor readings */,
  "sensor_sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the sensor */,
  "sensor_last_calibration" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "sensor_next_calibration" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that took the reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that took the reading */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the reading (in milliseconds) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "device_location" TEXT /* Location where the device was during the reading */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the reading (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "reading_status" TEXT /* Status of the reading (e.g., valid, invalid, pending) */,
  "reading_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "w_axis_readings" (
  "w_axis_reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each W-Axis reading */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading that this W-Axis reading belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the W-Axis reading */,
  "axis_status" TEXT /* Status of the axis reading (e.g., valid, invalid, pending) */,
  "axis_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the axis reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("w_axis_reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_w_axis_readings_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "x_axis_readings" (
  "x_axis_reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each X-Axis reading */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading that this X-Axis reading belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the X-Axis reading */,
  "axis_status" TEXT /* Status of the axis reading (e.g., valid, invalid, pending) */,
  "axis_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the axis reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("x_axis_reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_x_axis_readings_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "y_axis_readings" (
  "y_axis_reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Y-Axis reading */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading that this Y-Axis reading belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the Y-Axis reading */,
  "axis_status" TEXT /* Status of the axis reading (e.g., valid, invalid, pending) */,
  "axis_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the axis reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("y_axis_reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_y_axis_readings_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "z_axis_readings" (
  "z_axis_reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Z-Axis reading */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading that this Z-Axis reading belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the Z-Axis reading */,
  "axis_status" TEXT /* Status of the axis reading (e.g., valid, invalid, pending) */,
  "axis_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the axis reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("z_axis_reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_z_axis_readings_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_stamps" (
  "time_stamp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time stamp */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading that this time stamp belongs to */,
  "time_stamp" TEXT /* Time stamp of the reading (in ISO format) */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the time stamp */,
  "time_stamp_status" TEXT /* Status of the time stamp (e.g., valid, invalid, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_stamp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_stamps_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elapsed_time" (
  "elapsed_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each elapsed time */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading that this elapsed time belongs to */,
  "elapsed_time" REAL /* Elapsed time of the reading (in seconds) */,
  "elapsed_time_status" TEXT /* Status of the elapsed time (e.g., valid, invalid, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("elapsed_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elapsed_time_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, developer, admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "user_last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the reading */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading that was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the reading was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access action */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES readings ("reading_id")
)
